Fern Polrucel PnecrrcEs CoiururssroN
428 J Street r Suite 620 o Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 e Fax (916) 322-0886
March 9,2A04
SENT By FACSIMTLE - FAX NO. (415) 788_0900
Linda Balok, Esq.
Steefel, Levitt & Weiss
One Embarcadero Center, Thirtieth Floor
San Francisco, California 941 I I -37 lg
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-062
Dear Ms. Balok:
This letter responds to your request for clarification with respect to our Tanke Advice
Lettet No. 04-002 regarding a potential conflict of interest for Marin Health Care District
Director Esther Blau. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329O)(gXB),
unless you are an authorized representative of the director for whom you seek assistanc{ the Fair
Political Practices Commission cannot address your question orprorride analysis.
However, our advice is applicable and confers immunity (see section 831 14) only to the
extent that the facts provided to us are correct, and that all of the material facts have been
disclosed. (In re Oglesby (1975) I FPPC Ops. 71; DorsqtAdvice Letter No. 4-01-125.) If you
believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you have the option of filing a
complaint with our Enforcernent Division. I have enclosed afactsheet explaining the "olrptuirrt
process procedure.
Should you have any additional questions regarding this maffer, please contact the
Commission at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General
By: William
Enclosure;
WJLjg
Re
+Yr$l
Commission Counsel

sections.conclusion: Under California Code of Regulations 18329(i)(gXB), unless the requester is an authorized representative of the director, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address the question or provide analysis. Advice is applicable and confers immunity only to the extent that all facts provided are correct and all material facts have been disclosed.
sections.question_synthetic: Whether the FPPC can provide advice regarding a potential conflict of interest for a Marin Health Care District Director when the request is made by an attorney who may not be an authorized representative of the director.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC cannot provide advice on this matter unless the requester is an authorized representative of the director in question. Any prior advice given is only applicable if all facts are correct and all material facts have been fully disclosed.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document references a prior advice letter (Tanke Advice Letter No. 04-002) but the current request appears to be a follow-up clarification. No formal QUESTION and CONCLUSION sections with headers, but substantive legal questions and FPPC's response are identifiable in body text. Reference to regulations and precedent cases included. Enclosure mentioned but not provided in text.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether the FPPC can provide advice regarding a potential conflict of interest for a Marin Health Care District Director when the request is made by an attorney who may not be an authorized representative of the director.

CONCLUSION: Under California Code of Regulations 18329(i)(gXB), unless the requester is an authorized representative of the director, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address the question or provide analysis. Advice is applicable and confers immunity only to the extent that all facts provided are correct and all material facts have been disclosed.

embedding.summary: This is an FPPC response to a request for clarification regarding a prior Tanke Advice Letter regarding a potential conflict of interest for a Marin Health Care District Director. The FPPC declines to address the question due to standing requirements under Commission regulations.
